info.title: FlashNX
info.author: Jonathan8520
info.description: Play your Flash (.swf) games on Switch —
info.details: FlashNX is a homebrew Flash player for the Nintendo Switch, powered by Ruffle. Play your .swf games (AS1/AS2 and partial AS3) straight from your SD card — Super Mario 63, Super Mario World Flash, and many more. Features a joycon-navigable game library, in-game remappable controls (48 Flash keys), native game saves (.sol), and remote import from archive.org over HTTPS. Heavy games may be limited by Ruffle's ActionScript interpreter (CPU-bound, no JIT). Atmosphère required. Powered by Ruffle (ruffle.rs) — all Flash emulation credit goes to the Ruffle project.

changelog: v1.0.0 — First official release. Flash playback (AS1/AS2 + partial AS3) via Ruffle, joycon library UI, remappable controls, native .sol saves, archive.org HTTPS import.
